notes: Initial population of Library based on current Master Story Bible. Categories and starter entries created. All new entries set to 'review' pending Erica's input. Structure follows consistent formatting for future expansion.

categories.name: Characters
categories.description: Key people and beings central to the story

entries.title: Tiff
entries.summary: 14-year-old girl at the children's Home who gains sensitivity to emotional frequencies after a near-death experience.
entries.content: Tiff is the steady 'Big' leader who cares for younger kids. She carries deep grief from losing her parents at age 9. After her NDE during the second storm, she develops heightened sensitivity to emotional frequencies. Her arc moves from overwhelm and isolation toward internal balance and using her gift to help others.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment. Please review for accuracy and tone.

entries.title: Lumenora (Lumi)
entries.summary: Bouncy, poetic fairy guide who brings clarity, joy, and balanced perspective using rhyming, satirical humor.
entries.content: Lumenora (Lumi) is one of Tiff's two guides. She is positively neurotic, uses Dr. Seuss-style rhyming, and helps Tiff see moments of clarity and what balanced emotional frequencies feel like. She bickers with Thornak but deeply respects his role.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment. Please review.

entries.title: Thornak (Thorn / Hack)
entries.summary: Chaotic, enthusiastic goblin guide who pushes Tiff to confront difficult emotions and imbalance directly.
entries.content: Thornak (Thorn) is Tiff's second guide. He is playful and occasionally crass (kid-appropriate), with fragmented, choppy speech. He helps Tiff face anxiety and hard feelings head-on. He and Lumi have a long-standing dynamic of respectful bickering.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment. Please review.

entries.title: Timmy
entries.summary: Long-term resident at the Home whose unresolved trauma and resentment amplify celestial imbalance.
entries.content: Timmy is a mirror to Tiff. Both carry storm trauma, but he chooses isolation and control while she learns connection and balance. His failed escape attempt and strict 'Act Right!' conditioning deepen his internal static and contribute to weakening portals.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment. Please review for tone and accuracy.

categories.name: World & Cosmology
categories.description: The setting, rules, and mystical elements of the story's world

entries.title: The Home (Rays of Hope)
entries.summary: Children's Home built on a major ley line nexus that amplifies emotional frequencies.
entries.content: The Home is a nodal nexus where clashing harmonic frequencies converge. This amplifies emotions and weakens the veils between realms, making portals more common. It is both a place of care and a site of growing imbalance.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment.

entries.title: Portals
entries.summary: Weakened rifts between the human plane and the goblin/fairy harmonic realms.
entries.content: Portals appear subtly at first, especially in the woods. They are discovered accidentally by Timmy. Emotional imbalance at the nexus weakens the veils, allowing more frequent and fragile portals.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment.

entries.title: Insects (Repair Crew)
entries.summary: Seemingly ordinary but strangely coordinated insects that act as a cosmic repair crew for portals.
entries.content: Swarms of insects appear to mend weakened portals. Their excess presence around the Home becomes a running visual gag and a sign of increasing imbalance.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment.

categories.name: Themes & Emotional Frequencies
categories.description: Core thematic elements and the emotional frequency system

entries.title: Balance vs. Imbalance
entries.summary: The central conflict is not good vs evil, but balance versus imbalance in emotional frequencies.
entries.content: All emotional frequencies and the creatures that embody them have purpose. The true conflict arises when balance is disrupted. Tiff learns to restore balance in herself and others, while Timmy's repression and control deepen imbalance.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment.

entries.title: Emotional Frequencies
entries.summary: Invisible emotional energies that goblins and fairies embody and that the Home's nexus amplifies.
entries.content: Emotional frequencies can be balanced or imbalanced. Strong feelings ripple outward at the nexus. Tiff's new sensitivity allows her to perceive these frequencies and the beings connected to them.
entries.needsReviewReason: Initial entry created during 'Update webtool' alignment.
